positive: A celestial forest bioluminescent scene, featuring stylized, minimalist representations of glowing flora and fauna. The main subject is a central, stylized cluster of branching, glowing forms resembling roots and antlers. The palette is dominated by deep sapphire blues, iridescent teals, and contrasting neon magenta highlights. Use clean lines and strong, crisp silhouettes reminiscent of Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints crossed with modern vector art. High contrast lighting, volumetric fog creating depth, and a composition suitable for wrapping around a garment. Art Deco influence for structure, maximalist detail in the bioluminescence, and a clean, negative space background. Perfect print quality, graphic novel aesthetic, fantasy concept art.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, realistic anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, low detail, gradients, grain, low resolution, messy composition
